name: Defined Protection Annuity

data_sources.note: Nationwide Defined Protection Annuity S-1 filing (CIK 205695, Nationwide Life Insurance Company). DPA 1.0 (this product) and DPA 2.0 both share the same underlying registrant; this spec covers the original DPA which remains in-force; new DPA 2.0 product captured in nationwide_dpa_2.json.
Nationwide RILA product family page. Defined Protection Annuity is the protection-level-selectable RILA variant (100%/95%/90% level options).
Nationwide Life Insurance Company AM Best FSR A+ (Superior). Synthetic anchor confirmed.

verification_notes: AM Best A+ confirmed; underlying carrier (Nationwide Life Insurance Company) and product family confirmed via SEC + carrier site; surrender schedule and exact cap rate retained at synthetic — DPA 1.0 is now legacy as DPA 2.0 is the actively-sold variant (see nationwide_dpa_2).
